title: Tarif Kalba heat wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Tarif Kalba, with a Z-Score of +4.60. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Tarif Kalba is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 15.1 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 20%, which is relatively low, and the wind speed is at 29.6 km/h. 
 These conditions are resulting in a critical situation, with no Heating Degree Days (HDD) and a significant impact on the local population.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols immediately to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
